issues.description: Action sequence is wrong. The card text says 'You may trash 1 card from your hand' as a choice, then IF a condition is met, THEN search. Current DSL chains TrashFromHand directly into SearchDeck without the conditional check on DON!! counts.
Missing condition that checks if opponent's DON!! count ≥ your DON!! count before executing search. The effect should only search if this condition is true.
SearchDeck filter is 'Any' but should specify: kind='Character', type includes 'The Vinsmoke Family', power ≤ 4000, and source is trash (not deck).
Should be 'ReturnToHand' or equivalent with trash source, not 'SearchDeck'. The card searches from trash, not deck.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: If the number of DON!! cards on your field is equal to or less than the number on your opponent's field, add up to 1 {The Vinsmoke Family} type Character card with 4000 power or less from your trash to your hand.
